entries.label: export_report_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal wrapper → @radix-ui/react-dialog Dialog + DialogContent with size variants via cn()
Local useState for fmt/delivery/submitting/error → useForm (react-hook-form) + zodResolver; async submit → Server Action with FormData
setTimeout mock export → real Server Action calling storage presigned URL or email queue (Resend), emitting outbox event on success
Hardcoded rowEstimate threshold checks (warn >500, block >10000) → server-validated limits from RPT_SETTINGS.exportLimits (V-RPT-EXPORT-5/6)
Inline radio group for format → RadioGroup + RadioGroupItem from shadcn; disabled XLSX option keeps badge-gray disabled state
Conditional email Field → controlled show/hide via watch('delivery') in useForm; validate email with zod .email()
Alert boxes (alert-red, alert-blue, alert-amber) → shadcn Alert + AlertDescription with variant prop
Hardcoded labels → next-intl t('reporting.export.*') keys

entries.label: save_preset_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog + DialogContent; edit vs create mode passed as prop drives title and initial field values via defaultValues in useForm
Duplicate-name check (dup = name === hardcoded string) → server-side uniqueness check in Server Action; optimistic client zod .refine() for UX feedback
Filter snapshot chip list → read active searchParams from URL (Next.js useSearchParams) serialised into preset JSON; chips rendered with shadcn Badge variant='secondary'
Visibility radio (me/team) → RadioGroup; persisted as enum column on saved_filter_presets table with RBAC guard (only Manager/Admin can set team)
tooLong check (>60 chars) → zod z.string().max(60) client+server; maxLength={80} on input is a soft guard only
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys

entries.label: schedule_report_modal
translation_notes: window.Stepper primitive → custom Stepper built with shadcn Steps or a simple ol/li with Tailwind classes; completed Set tracks visited steps
Two-step local state (step / completed) → useReducer or React Context; step state could also live in URL searchParams for deep-linkable wizard
Cadence select + conditional day-of-week checkboxes → FormField controlled by watch('cadence'); day-of-week becomes a multi-select with Toggle from shadcn
Recipient tag-input (onKeyDown Enter) → react-email-autocomplete or Combobox + Badge chip pattern; validate each entry with zod .email()
Subject template preview → computed via string interpolation from watch values; in production use a safe template renderer (e.g. mustache)
Schedule activation → Server Action creates scheduled_reports row + registers cron in pg_cron (or Trigger.dev job); emits outbox event
Phase 2 badge on modal title signals deferred feature; production RBAC guard: require reporting.scheduled_delivery feature flag ON
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys

entries.label: share_report_modal
translation_notes: navigator.clipboard.writeText → same API in production; wrap in try/catch + fallback execCommand for older browsers; show Toast (Sonner) on copy success
Hardcoded URL → generated server-side as signed URL with expiry stored in shared_report_links table; link expiry column driven by select value
'Require Login' toggle → checkbox controls requires_auth boolean; regulatory dashboard IDs (QC Holds, Inventory Aging) are blocked from unauthenticated sharing via RBAC rule
Alert info box about external sharing → driven by a domain rule (report_share_gate_v1) evaluated server-side; client shows read-only notice
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys

entries.label: delete_confirm_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal size='sm' → Dialog with max-w-sm DialogContent; destructive pattern: btn-danger → Button variant='destructive'
d.kind prop drives warning text (preset vs schedule) → pass via modal data prop; production Server Action branches on entity type
Audit log note ('logged with user and timestamp') → Server Action must INSERT into audit_log table with user_id from session + timestamp; not just UI text
Known cross-system: BL-PROD-05 in BACKLOG.md — btn-danger class missing from shared.css; ensure Button variant='destructive' maps to correct Tailwind tokens in production
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys
known_bugs: BL-PROD-05: .btn-danger missing from _shared/shared.css — destructive confirms fall back to primary styling

entries.label: error_log_modal
translation_notes: window.Summary primitive (key-value rows) → custom dl/dt/dd or Table without headers; consider shadcn Table for consistency
Pre-formatted error message block → pre tag with overflow-auto; in production fetch from export_error_log table by export_id
Retry Export button → re-triggers the original export Server Action with same parameters; needs idempotency key to avoid duplicate jobs
Error code (PDF_TIMEOUT / V-RPT-EXPORT-7) → enum in export_error_codes table; 'Suggested action' text derived from code lookup, not hardcoded
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys

entries.label: regulatory_signoff_modal
translation_notes: PIN input (type='password', letterSpacing) → masked Input; in production PIN verification must be server-side: compare bcrypt hash stored against user profile, never send plain PIN over network
Lockout after 3 attempts (attempts state) → server-side attempt counter with exponential backoff + account lock; client state alone is bypassable
Summary rows (SHA-256, record count, regulation) → server-computed before modal opens; SHA-256 must be the actual hash of the export payload, embedded in PDF footer
Declaration text (BRCGS Issue 10 §3.4, 7-year retention) → from regulatory_requirements table keyed by regulation code; must be immutable after sign-off
On successful sign → Server Action creates regulatory_signoffs record (user_id, export_id, regulation_ref, sha256, signed_at) + triggers PDF generation
BL-QA-06 cross-reference: virtual-keypad PIN anti-keylogger flagged as Medium in BACKLOG.md — implement for production
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys

entries.label: refresh_confirm_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal size='sm' → Dialog max-w-sm; non-destructive confirm pattern — Button variant='default' not 'destructive'
setTimeout mock (1400ms) → Server Action calling REFRESH MATERIALIZED VIEW CONCURRENTLY via Drizzle raw SQL; view name passed as validated enum, never interpolated directly
Loading state on both buttons during refresh → useTransition (isPending) from React 19 or Server Action pending state; disable both Cancel + Refresh buttons while pending
Domain ref DS-0012 → link to internal data-sources registry; production shows last_refresh timestamp from pg_stat_user_tables or a dedicated mv_refresh_log
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys

entries.label: recipient_group_modal
translation_notes: Member list table with Remove action → shadcn Table with DataTable pattern; member rows from report_recipient_groups join users; Remove calls Server Action to delete membership row
Email/name search input → Combobox (shadcn) with server-side user search (Drizzle ilike query); debounced 300ms
Group Name field → zod z.string().min(1).max(80); uniqueness checked server-side in Server Action
Table inside modal (members) → acceptable for small lists (<20); if groups can be large, replace with virtualized list (TanStack Virtual)
Save Group → Server Action upserts recipient_groups + recipient_group_members rows; emits outbox event
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys

entries.label: run_now_confirm_modal
translation_notes: Simple confirm with schedule name + recipient count → Dialog max-w-sm; data passed via modal context/props
Run & deliver button → Server Action triggers immediate job via Trigger.dev or pg_cron one-shot; returns job_id for status polling
No loading state in prototype → add useTransition isPending; disable button while Server Action in flight
Recipient count display → fetched from scheduled_reports.recipients_count (denormalised) or JOIN on recipient_group_members
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys

entries.label: p2_toast_modal
translation_notes: Info dialog for P2 features → in production replace with Sonner toast or inline disabled state + tooltip; Dialog is heavier than needed for a one-action info message
Feature flag name (reporting.v2_dashboards) → PostHog flag evaluated server-side in Server Component; if flag ON, render real component instead of placeholder
d.name prop drives message body → comes from RPT_CATALOG metadata; in production read from dashboards_catalog table
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys

entries.label: access_denied_modal
translation_notes: RBAC-denied dialog → in production, Server Component should gate the page/route; modal is a fallback for client-triggered actions that fail the access check
DSL rule name (report_access_gate_v1) + deny result → read from RBAC evaluation response body; log to audit_log on deny
Resource name prop (d.resource) → from RPT_CATALOG metadata; maps to permission_resource enum in RBAC system
Server-side preferred: middleware.ts should redirect to /403 for page-level access; modal only for inline action denials
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys

entries.label: rpt_home_dashboard_catalog
translation_notes: RPT_CATALOG array (hardcoded) → Drizzle query SELECT from dashboards_catalog table in Server Component; filtered by user's RBAC site scope
Client-side filter (q/domain/phase useState) → URL searchParams with nuqs; preserves filter state on navigation and enables shareable filtered URLs
staleCount computed from c.stale flag → server-computed from mv_refresh_log; freshness badge driven by data, not prototype mock
WeekSelector component → DateRangePicker or custom week-picker built with shadcn Calendar + Popover; synced to URL param
rpt-cat-grid CSS grid → Tailwind grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 responsive; rpt-cat-card → shadcn Card with hover states
P2 card click → openModal('p2Toast') → in production check PostHog flag server-side; render disabled Card with Tooltip explaining P2 timeline
BL-RPT-03: zero-state variant (fresh install) not implemented; add empty-state Card with helper text per BACKLOG.md Medium priority
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys
known_bugs: BL-RPT-03: Onboarding/fresh-install zero-state variants not implemented (Medium priority)

entries.label: rpt_factory_overview
translation_notes: RPT_FO_KPIS / RPT_FO_TREND mock data → Drizzle queries against mv_factory_overview_week materialized view; KPIs as React Server Component with Suspense boundary per tile
ChartCombo (inline SVG) → Recharts ComposedChart (Line + Bar) or Tremor AreaChart; BACKLOG BL-RPT-02 explicitly calls out D3-shape replacement
OEE embed widget (consumer of 15-OEE) → separate RSC data fetch from mv_oee_daily; badge 'Consumer of 15-OEE' must remain to communicate data ownership
Spark mini-chart → Recharts Sparkline or lightweight SVG component; reuse across all table rows — extract as <SparkLine data={[]} /> server component
All Lines Summary table with drill-to-yield-by-line → shadcn DataTable (TanStack Table) with row onClick → router.push; YieldCell / GradeBadge / VarianceBadge → small RSCs
FreshnessStrip (at / cadence / onRefresh) → reads mv_refresh_log.last_refresh; auto-refreshes via Next.js router.refresh() on timer or Server-Sent Events
FilterChips + WeekSelector → URL searchParams (nuqs); ExportDropdown → Dropdown with Server Action trigger
BL-RPT-04: @media print stylesheet for Puppeteer PDF export not implemented (Medium priority)
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys
known_bugs: BL-RPT-02: Hand-rolled SVG charts need replacement with D3-shape + d3-scale (P2)
BL-RPT-04: @media print stylesheet for Puppeteer PDF export missing (Medium)

entries.label: rpt_yield_by_line
translation_notes: RPT_FO_LINES filtered (factoryAvg excluded) → Drizzle query from mv_yield_by_line_week; factory average row is a SQL GROUP BY aggregate appended client-side or as UNION
Row click drill to yield_by_sku → router.push with query params; DrillCrumb breadcrumb → Next.js Link components using current URL segments
YieldCell, VariancePctBadge, VarianceBadge, GradeBadge, WWChange → extract as small shared Badge/Cell components in components/reporting/cells.tsx
Spark mini-chart in table cell → Recharts SparkLine; ensure it is memoised (React.memo) for table row performance
Factory Average row styling (borderTop, fontWeight:700) → TanStack Table row pinning or conditional className based on row.original.factoryAvg flag
Sort any column note → enable TanStack Table column sorting; server-side sort preferred for large datasets via URL searchParams
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys
known_bugs: BL-RPT-02: Hand-rolled SVG charts (Spark) need replacement (P2)

entries.label: rpt_yield_by_sku
translation_notes: RPT_YBS_SKUS mock + client-side line filter → Drizzle query with WHERE line = $1 from mv_yield_by_sku_week; filter via URL searchParam
Expandable row (expanded === s.code) → TanStack Table row expansion; inner 13-week trend uses ChartLine → replace with Recharts LineChart
Inner Summary component (key-value rows) → shadcn dl/dt/dd or a compact Table; same Summary primitive used across multiple modals — extract to components/shared/SummaryGrid.tsx
Cross-module link 'View all runs in Production' → router.push('/production/work-orders?product=' + code); URL param validated server-side
Conditional line filter banner (blue-050 background) → shadcn Alert with variant='info'; shown only when lineFilter !== 'All Lines'
contrib-bar inline bar chart → CSS width percentage span; in production replace with Recharts or keep as simple Tailwind bar — acceptable for contribution column
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys
known_bugs: BL-RPT-02: ChartLine SVG needs D3-shape replacement (P2)

entries.label: rpt_qc_holds
translation_notes: RPT_QC_HOLDS mock + client filter (shift/line) → Drizzle query from mv_qc_holds_daily with WHERE shift = $1 AND line = $2; FreshnessStrip cadence='5 min' maps to MV refresh cron
HoldSeverity / HoldStatus / ShiftBadge primitives → small Badge components in components/reporting/cells.tsx with colour variant map
Totals footer row (reduce over visible) → SQL GROUP BY aggregate or client-side reduce; prefer server-side for accuracy
Cross-module link 'View in QA' → router.push('/quality/holds/' + holdId); route must exist in quality module; validate holdId format server-side
AM/PM shift summary cards with ChartBarH → two Recharts BarChart (horizontal layout) in a grid; data from server split by shift
Critical holds alert banner (alert-red) → shown when critical.length > 0; in production filter is server-computed to avoid exposing all rows to client
FilterChips with onSavePreset → opens save_preset_modal with dashboard='QC Holds'; preset snapshot serialises active URL searchParams
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys

entries.label: rpt_oee_summary
translation_notes: RPT_OEE_BY_LINE + RPT_OEE_TREND mock → Drizzle queries from mv_oee_by_line (consumed read-only from 15-OEE module); cross-module ownership banner must remain in production UI
ChartGroupedBar (inline SVG) → Recharts BarChart grouped (A/P/Q bars per line); 85% world-class target line → ReferenceLine component
GaugeRing SVG component → Recharts RadialBarChart or custom SVG gauge; extract as components/reporting/GaugeRing.tsx
OEE Trend table with 7-day avg footer row → TanStack Table; Spark sparkline in last column → Recharts Sparkline memoised
Shift Comparison nested table (AM/PM sections) → TanStack Table with row grouping or manual React.Fragment pattern; shift rows sourced from same MV
'Open 15-OEE' cross-module link → router.push('/oee'); read-only consumer view annotation must be preserved in production to clarify data ownership
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys

entries.label: rpt_inventory_aging
translation_notes: RPT_INV_BY_CAT + RPT_INV_EXPIRING + RPT_INV_BY_PROD + RPT_INV_SLOW mock → four separate Drizzle queries from mv_inventory_aging; split into Suspense-bounded RSC sections
ChartStackedBarH (horizontal stacked bar by age bucket) → Recharts BarChart with layout='vertical' + stacked; segment colors map to age thresholds (fresh/att/warn/crit)
Expiry Alerts table: daysRem conditional color → computed column in SQL (EXTRACT DAYS FROM expiry - NOW()); negative = expired, highlight red in TableCell
Cross-module LP link → router.push('/warehouse/license-plates/' + lp); LP code format validated (LP-\d+ or LP\d+) server-side
Slow-moving SKUs table → separate query or CTE filtering lps >14 days avg age and >100 kg; 'Review stock' badge → action triggers Warehouse module workflow
Warehouse / Category selects → URL searchParams; category enum from product_categories table
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys

entries.label: rpt_wo_status
translation_notes: RPT_WO_FUNNEL + RPT_WO_ROWS mock → Drizzle query from mv_wo_status_daily; funnel segments via GROUP BY status COUNT(*)
wo-funnel clickable segments (filter state) → custom CSS flex bar with onClick; in production use Recharts FunnelChart or retain CSS with accessible role='button' + keyboard handler
WO table: WO# click cross-module → router.push('/production/work-orders/' + wo); WOStatusBadge → Badge variant map by status string
YieldCell: shows '—' when yield null → null coalescing in SQL; never render undefined in TableCell
WIP by Line table with prog-thin progress bar → shadcn Progress component; completion % from mv_wip_by_line JOIN work_orders
filter state (filter / setFilter) → URL searchParam; allows shareable filtered WO list URLs
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys

entries.label: rpt_shipment_otd
translation_notes: RPT_OTD_TREND (8-week) + RPT_OTD_CUSTOMERS + RPT_OTD_LATE mock → Drizzle queries from mv_shipment_otd_weekly; lateCount from server, not client filter
ChartLine OTD trend with target=95 → Recharts LineChart + ReferenceLine at 95%; xKey='we' (week-ending) labels formatted with date-fns
OTD by Customer table: Spark sparklines per customer → Recharts Sparkline; Customer name → link to /shipping/customers/:id
Late Shipments section: shown conditionally (lateCount > 0) → Server Component renders section only if data.lateShipments.length > 0; no client branching needed
Cross-module shipment link → router.push('/shipping/shipments/' + ship); ship # format validated server-side
Customer select filter → Combobox with server search against customers table; WeekSelector → DateRangePicker week variant
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys

entries.label: rpt_integration_health
translation_notes: role !== 'Admin' early return → server-side RBAC: middleware.ts redirects non-Admin to /403; never rely on client-only guard for sensitive admin pages
RPT_IH_STAGES + RPT_IH_KPIS mock → Drizzle queries from integration_outbox_stages + integration_dlq tables; hasDlq computed server-side
ChartMultiLine (latency per stage, last 24h) → Recharts LineChart with multiple Series; data from integration_latency_log aggregated by hour
DLQ Detail table (conditional) → shown only if hasDlq; 'Go to DLQ Admin' → router.push('/admin/integrations/d365/dlq'); button requires Admin role guard
StageStatus primitive → Badge variant map (healthy=green, critical=red, p2=gray); phase badge (P1/P2) shows roadmap status
FreshnessStrip cadence='2 min' → pg_cron job for mv_integration_health; show last_check_at from db row
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys

entries.label: rpt_rules_usage
translation_notes: role !== 'Admin' early return → server-side RBAC middleware; Admin-only page guard at route level, not component level
RPT_RU_RULES expandable rows with input/output schema + audit log → Drizzle query from dsl_rules + rule_evaluation_log; expandable via TanStack Table row expansion
Last evaluation JSON display (PII-redacted) → server redacts user_id before serialising to client; pre tag with overflow-auto → shadcn ScrollArea
Recent audit mini-table (5 rows, allow/deny badges) → nested Table inside CollapsibleContent; rows from rule_audit_log WHERE rule_id = $1 LIMIT 5
ChartLine (eval latency trend, last 7 days, target=50ms) → Recharts LineChart; data from rule_latency_daily_agg
Orphan rule alert (never evaluated) → server computes WHERE last_fired IS NULL AND phase = 'P1'; alert shown as shadcn Alert variant='warning'
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys

entries.label: rpt_settings_tabbed
translation_notes: Custom rpt-settings-tabs (div with on class) → shadcn Tabs + TabsList + TabsTrigger + TabsContent; tab state → URL searchParam (?tab=general) for linkable deep URLs
role !== 'Admin' early return → server-side RBAC middleware; settings route protected at middleware.ts level
6 tab panels (General, Export Limits, PDF Branding, Email Delivery, Feature Flags, Data Sources) → each tab's form is an independent Server Action; avoid single monolithic save

PDF Branding: file input for logo → Next.js Route Handler + Vercel Blob for image upload; Primary Color input[type=color] → use same; Preview PDF → trigger PDF generation Server Action returning presigned URL
Feature Flags table (PostHog) → read-only view of PostHog flags via PostHog API (server-side); 'Manage in PostHog' link → external PostHog dashboard URL
Data Sources table with Force Refresh → each row calls refresh_confirm_modal with view name; view list from mv_registry table (or static config enum)
Email Delivery tab: sender identity reads from SETTINGS (02-SETTINGS §13 Resend) — link to /settings/integrations/resend
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys

entries.label: rpt_exports_history
translation_notes: RPT_EXPORTS mock → Drizzle query from export_log WHERE user_id = session.user.id; 7-year retention requirement enforced by soft-delete (deleted_at IS NULL AND created_at > NOW() - '7 years'::interval)
SHA-256 truncation display (e.sha.substring(0,16) + '…') → same pattern; full hash available in title/tooltip; verified against stored value server-side on download
Download button → Server Action generates presigned S3/Vercel Blob URL valid 60s; archived exports → Server Action routes to cold storage retrieval workflow
Failed row → 'Error details' opens error_log_modal; retry re-enqueues export job via Trigger.dev; needs idempotency key
Export (CSV) button in header → generates CSV of export_log rows for audit purposes; itself an export that must be logged
FmtBadge primitive → Badge with variant based on fmt string ('pdf'→blue, 'csv'→gray, 'xlsx'→green)
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys

entries.label: rpt_saved_filters
translation_notes: canManage = role === 'Manager' || role === 'Admin' → server-side RBAC; role from session in Server Component; client never sees protected content
RPT_SAVED mock → Drizzle query from saved_filter_presets WHERE (created_by = session.user.id OR visibility = 'team') AND site_id = session.site_id
Apply button → router.push(preset.dashboard_url + '?' + preset.filter_params_json); filter params must be URL-safe encoded
Edit button → opens save_preset_modal with edit=true and preset data; Delete → opens delete_confirm_modal; both use Server Actions
Empty state card (no presets) → shadcn EmptyState pattern with icon + description + CTA button; triggered when RPT_SAVED.length === 0
Visibility badge (team vs just me) → Badge variant='outline' for team, variant='secondary' for private
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys

entries.label: rpt_scheduled_list
translation_notes: canManage role check + reporting.scheduled_delivery flag check → server-side: middleware checks role; PostHog flag evaluated in Server Component; combined guard before rendering table
RPT_SCHED_ROWS mock → Drizzle query from scheduled_reports WHERE site_id = session.site_id; status enum (active/paused/dlq) from column
sched-row-failed CSS highlight → TanStack Table row className callback: row.original.status === 'dlq' → 'bg-red-50'
Run Now (▶) → opens run_now_confirm_modal; Error (⚠) → opens error_log_modal with DLQ error; Delete (✕) → opens delete_confirm_modal kind='schedule'
Past due nextRun highlight (red/bold) → computed in Server Component: nextRun < now → pastDue flag; rendered with cn() conditional classes
FmtBadge + outcome badge → same Badge variant pattern as export history; failures counter threshold (≥3 = red) → conditional cn()
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys

entries.label: rpt_scheduled_edit
translation_notes: Four card sections (Report, Cadence, Recipients, Retry Policy) → single Server Action form; use react-hook-form with zodResolver for client validation; each section is a <FormSection> with its own Field groupings
Schedule type toggle (preset vs custom cron) → RadioGroup controlling conditional form fields; cron string validated with cron-validate library server-side
Day-of-week toggle buttons (btn-primary/secondary) → shadcn ToggleGroup + ToggleGroupItem; days stored as bitmask or array in scheduled_reports.days_of_week column
Time select (30-min intervals, 48 options) → shadcn Select with generated options; or TimePicker component; timezone Select from IANA tz list
Recipients tag input → Combobox + tag chips; validate each email with zod; 'Add recipient group' → opens recipient_group_modal
Sticky sidebar Schedule Summary → updates live via watch() in react-hook-form; 'Next 3 runs' computed client-side with cronstrue or date-fns-tz
Retry Policy section: Max Retries select + DLQ behaviour explanation → maps to scheduled_reports.max_retries column; retry intervals table from V-RPT-SCHEDULE-4 spec
Save Schedule → Server Action creates/updates scheduled_reports row + registers job via Trigger.dev; validate reporting.scheduled_delivery flag is ON before save
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys
